metadata.name: Information Model Structure
metadata.description: Hierarchy of information containers and information models defined in ISO 19650:2018.
metadata.author: ISO19650 Knowledge Maps

nodes.label: Information Container
nodes.description: A container of information managed within the common data environment.

nodes.label: Information Model
nodes.description: A structured set of information containers.

nodes.label: Project Information Model (PIM)
nodes.description: Information model used during project delivery.

nodes.label: Asset Information Model (AIM)
nodes.description: Information model used during asset operation.

nodes.label: Information Exchange
nodes.description: Exchange of information containers between stakeholders.

nodes.label: Asset Lifecycle
nodes.description: Lifecycle stages of the asset where information is used.

evidence.quote: Information models are collections of information containers.
The project information model supports project delivery activities.
The asset information model supports asset management during operation.
Information developed during project delivery contributes to the asset information model.
Information exchanges deliver information containers between parties.
The asset information model supports decision-making during the lifecycle of the asset.
